original_question: A very special island is inhabited only by knights and knaves. Knights always tell the truth, and knaves always lie. You meet 4 inhabitants: Victoria, James, Owen, and Isabella. Victoria expressed that Owen is a knight. James stated, "If Isabella is a knight then James is a knight". Owen commented, "If Owen is a knight then James is a knave". Isabella expressed that Owen is a knight or Victoria is a knave. So who is a knight and who is a knave?
